sections.paragraph:
Original: חמא חמה

Transliteration: chêmâh chêmâ'

Phonetic: khay-maw'

BDB Definition:

  1. heat, rage, hot displeasure, indignation, anger, wrath, poison, bottles
    1. heat
      1. fever
      2. venom, poison (figuratively)
    2. burning anger, rage

Origin: from H3179

TWOT entry: 860a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
